svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content: <mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/143.0.0.0 Safari/537.36 OPR/127.0.0.0" version="29.6.0" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Seite-1" id="mARbx8tzQMT2IC7FhMZc"> <mxGraphModel dx="1424" dy="778" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title_node" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;" value="<h1>High‑Level Pose + Depth Pipeline</h1>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="300" x="240" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nodeA" parent="1" style="whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;rounded=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" tooltip="Single RGB image from drone/camera." value="Input image" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="120" x="50" y="182" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nodeB" parent="1" style="whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;rounded=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" tooltip="Input: Image from Node A.<br>Description: YOLO pose model detects people/objects and their 2D keypoints + bounding boxes." value="Pose detection<br><font style="font-size: 9px;">(YoloV11)</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="120" x="250" y="122" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nodeC" parent="1" style="whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;rounded=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" tooltip="Input: Same image from Node A.<br>Description: Depth Anything 3 predicts a dense depth map and camera calibration (intrinsics + extrinsics)." value="Depth estimation<br><font style="font-size: 9px;">(Depth Anything v3)</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="120" x="250" y="232" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nodeD" parent="1" style="whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;rounded=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" tooltip="Inputs: 2D keypoints from Node B + depth map and calibration from Node C.<br>Description: Look up depth at each keypoint and back‑project to 3D in camera space and then to world space." value="Fusion: keypoints + depth" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="120" x="430" y="182" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nodeE" parent="1" style="whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;rounded=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;" tooltip="Inputs: 3D keypoints + original image.<br>Description:<br>Save images with drawn keypoints and bounding boxes.<br>Export 3D data (e.g., GLB and printed coordinates) for further analysis/visualization." value="Outputs &amp; visualization" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="120" x="600" y="182" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edgeAB" edge="1" parent="1" source="nodeA" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;exitX=1;exitY=0.25;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;" target="nodeB" value=""> <mxGeometry height="50" relative="1" width="50" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="230" y="212" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="280" y="162" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edgeAC" edge="1" parent="1" source="nodeA" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;exitX=1;exitY=0.75;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;" target="nodeC" value=""> <mxGeometry height="50" relative="1" width="50" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="230" y="212" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="280" y="162" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edgeBD" edge="1" parent="1" source="nodeB" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.25;" target="nodeD" value=""> <mxGeometry height="50" relative="1" width="50" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="480" y="132" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="530" y="82" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edgeCD" edge="1" parent="1" source="nodeC" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.75;" target="nodeD" value=""> <mxGeometry height="50" relative="1" width="50" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="480" y="322" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="530" y="272" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edgeDE" edge="1" parent="1" source="nodeD" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;" target="nodeE" value=""> <mxGeometry height="50" relative="1" width="50" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="730" y="212" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="780" y="162" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
